title: SkyOriginsTech
description: SkyOrigins Tech 2 is a progression-based technology expansion designed to fit seamlessly into skyblock-style gameplay. Built as the evolution of the original SkyOrigins Tech, this mod focuses on resource generation, advanced crafting.
body:
SkyOrigins Tech 2 is a progression-based technology expansion designed to fit seamlessly into skyblock-style gameplay. Built as the evolution of the original SkyOrigins Tech, this mod focuses on resource generation, advanced crafting, and late-game automation.

Players begin with limited resources and are challenged to unlock increasingly complex machines, alloys, and void-powered technologies. The mod introduces custom ores, alloys such as Oblivion Alloy, and unique progression systems that tie into skyblock resource scarcity.

Unlike vanilla-style progression, SkyOrigins Tech 2 encourages automation and scaling from the very start. Every new tier unlocks improved efficiency, stronger tools, and deeper integration with other mods. With a mix of futuristic void-tech aesthetics and balanced grind mechanics, it delivers a unique tech-heavy skyblock experience.

Whether you’re starting fresh or expanding a massive automated factory, SkyOrigins Tech 2 offers the tools, systems, and lore-friendly depth to take your skyblock world to the next level.
